  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",

    "Task addressed: response to Telegram post with tips on organizing time.",
    "Sentence count: approximately 10-11 sentences, meeting the 10-sentence requirement.",
    "Three relevant tips provided: time management apps, reducing screen time, sleep/nutrition."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.58,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Punctuation; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A1; Low)",
    "at Play Market -> on Play Market (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "time to TV -> time on TV / time watching TV (Lexis; B1; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups / unsubscribe from useless groups (Lexis; B1; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "write me at personal messages -> message me privately / write to me in private messages (Lexis; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "simular", "correction": "similar", "comment": "Spelling error; common adjective.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "time to TV", "correction": "time on TV / time watching TV", "comment": "Incorrect preposition; 'spend time on something' is the correct collocation.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "leave from useless groups", "correction": "leave useless groups / unsubscribe from useless groups", "comment": "Awkward phrasing; 'leave from' is non-standard.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "at VK", "correction": "on VK", "comment": "Platform names typically take 'on'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "at Play Market", "correction": "on Play Market / in the Play Store", "comment": "Incorrect preposition for app store.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "enought", "correction": "enough", "comment": "Spelling error.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "write me at personal messages", "correction": "message me privately / write to me in private messages", "comment": "Non-standard phrasing; L1 interference likely.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {"excerpt": "Here is the tips", "correction": "Here are the tips", "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error; 'tips' is plural.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "this apps", "correction": "these apps", "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun error; 'apps' is plural, requires 'these'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "i", "correction": "I", "comment": "Capitalization error; first-person pronoun must be capitalized.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "I hope, my tips", "correction": "I hope my tips", "comment": "Unnecessary comma after 'hope'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {"excerpt": "i", "correction": "I", "comment": "Lowercase 'i' throughout indicates informal register; acceptable for chat context but noted.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"}
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "Manage your time", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Appropriate imperative with time management collocation."},
    {"item": "special apps and calendars", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Good lexical range for topic."},
    {"item": "social media", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Contemporary vocabulary appropriate to context."},
    {"item": "useless groups", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Adjective-noun collocation shows range."},
    {"item": "personal messages", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Attempted B1 phrase; error in preposition but range evident."}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level: A2. The text demonstrates basic vocabulary and simple sentence structures appropriate for A2. Multiple A1-A2 grammar errors (demonstrative pronouns 'this apps', subject-verb agreement 'Here is the tips', spelling 'simular/enought') indicate the learner is still consolidating foundational structures. Communicative task achieved with 3 relevant tips. Strengths at B1 level include time management vocabulary and topic-appropriate lexis (social media, calendars). Grammar score 0.58 reflects acceptable control with errors not impeding meaning.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice subject-verb agreement with plural nouns (tip/tips, this/these).",
    "Review common spelling patterns: similar, enough.",
    "Learn preposition collocations: spend time ON something, on social media platforms."
  ]
}

      {"excerpt": "look to life simplie", "correction": "look at life simply", "comment": "Wrong preposition ('to' vs 'at') and incorrect adverb formation ('simplie' vs 'simply').", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},

Key patterns: frequent spelling errors (abot, futcher, habbits, beleave, unlacky) indicate limited written accuracy; A2-level grammar errors include verb patterns (say→tell, need+to), word order (two my tips→my two tips), and subject-verb agreement.
